title: What Is a Self-Employed Mortgage Loan?
tagline: A self-employed mortgage is a type of home loan that self-employed borrowers can qualify for without having to submit tax returns, or other traditional income documentation.
bullets: Many entrepreneurs, independent contractors, and small business owners take advantage of tax code benefits, resulting in tax returns that may not accurately reflect their yearly earnings.
Self-employed mortgages are designed to solve this problem by providing several different loan solutions.
In most cases, these programs can tremendously increase the borrower's home buying power.

title: Bank Statement Loan
tagline: Most common mortgage solution for the self-employed borrower
bullets: Qualify using 12 or 24 months business or personal bank statements
No tax returns required
15, 30 & 40 year fixed terms available
First time home buyers welcome
Common sense approach to underwriting a business owner's financial profile
Competitive interest rates

title: Profit & Loss Loan (P&L Only)
tagline: Excellent mortgage alternative for the sophisticated self-employed borrower. A profit and loss loan looks at a borrower's company's P&L statement to determine if borrowers qualify for a loan.
bullets: This eliminates the need to use tax returns which can be helpful when applicants take a large number of deductions and do not qualify for traditional financing.
1 or 2 year cpa P&L
No tax returns required
30 year fixed terms available
Common sense approach to underwriting

title: Asset Based Loan
tagline: Loan option where borrowers can use their assets to qualify for a mortgage loan instead of employment income.
bullets: Investment accounts such as stocks, bonds, and mutual funds.
Money market accounts, CD's, checking or savings accounts.
Retirement accounts such as 401K or IRA

title: DSCR Loan
tagline: Real Estate Investment Loans. Qualification is based solely on the cash-flow of the investment property.
bullets: Qualify only using the income from the investment property.
30 Year fixed options available
Ideal for real estate investors
Ideal for purchase, refinance or cash out

title: HELOAN 2nd Mortgage
tagline: A Closed-end Cash-out Loan. For borrowers who want to access equity in their home and keep their low rate first mortgage.
bullets: Ideal for cash-out for many uses including debt consolidation, home improvement, etc.
Debt consolidation: Pay off high interest credit cards, car loans, or other debt
Home Improvement: Remodel your home or take on new projects to upgrade your property.
Qualify with 12 months bank statements or full doc
Keep your low interest 1st mortgage in place

title: Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC)
tagline: A home equity line of credit (HELOC) is a revolving credit line that's secured by the equity in your home.
bullets: You can use a HELOC for large expenses, such as home renovations or college tuition.
You can also use a HELOC to consolidate higher-interest rate debt on other loans, such as credit cards.

title: Private Money Loans
tagline: Kinnect Capital has access to a vast network of private money lenders ready to fund. Private money loans are short term, privately funded loans ideal for borrowers who need quick funding for real estate acquisition or refinance.
bullets: These loans have fewer underwriting requirements and can fund and close fast.
Can close quickly and easily
Flexible, easy underwriting requirements
Terms are typically 12-24 months
